services.heading: App and website development services for your business
services.subheading: From idea validation and prototyping, to mobile app development, web applications, localisation services, IT consulting, and ongoing support. Everything under one roof.

items.title: Website Development
items.description: We design and build custom websites and web applications — fast, accessible, and optimised to convert visitors into customers.

items.title: Custom App Development
items.description: We design and build custom applications tailored to exactly how your business works, for your success and your customers.

items.title: Idea Validation and MVP
items.description: Not sure if your idea will work? We help you validate it before spending a penny on a full build. We then create a Minimum Viable Product (MVP) so you can test it with real users fast.

items.title: UX Research
items.description: Already have a product or prototype? We help handling the research on how real people use your product, find what is confusing or broken, and give you a clear, prioritised list of improvements.

items.title: UX Design
items.description: Got a UX report? We turn findings into polished designs and, if needed, handle implementation too.

items.title: App Prototype
items.description: Before committing to a full build, we create an interactive prototype of your app. You can click through it, test it with users, and get investor feedback.

items.title: Mobile App Development
items.description: We build mobile apps that work on both iOS and Android from a single codebase, keeping costs down without compromising on look or feel.

items.title: Accessibility Audits
items.description: EU law now requires digital products to be accessible to people with disabilities. We audit your existing app or website and fix what needs fixing.

items.title: Software Consultancy
items.description: Not sure what to build, which technology to choose, or whether your idea is viable? We are here to help.

items.title: Maintenance and Support
items.description: Already have an app that needs looking after? We take on ongoing support, fix bugs, add new features, and keep things running smoothly.

items.title: Website & App Localisation
items.description: We handle the full localisation of your website or app — from translating content into multiple languages to integrating i18n tokens in your codebase. Reach new audiences without the headache.

items.title: Multi-Market Product Development
items.description: Building a product for multiple markets? We design and develop online products localised for different regions, languages, and cultural expectations — so you can launch globally with confidence.

founder.opening: I am a software engineer with a particular interest in UX and Accessibility, but I am also just a normal user of dozens of apps we all have to operate on a daily basis to get our work and life tasks done. I find websites and apps that have bad usability genuinely draining — it takes energy and time that could have gone towards things that actually matter. I love experiences that simply make sense, where you never have to stop and wonder what to do next. The truth is, most apps still do not feel that way. And that is exactly the gap we help close.
founder.name: My name is Lana.
founder.identity: Creative innovator, technical consultant for small businesses, frontend developer, and the founder of We Make IT.
founder.bio: For more than eight years, I have worked across web development in both large companies and small, close-knit teams. My focus has always been frontend engineering, Design Systems, and Accessibility. I am also a certified UX designer, and I genuinely love building interfaces that feel intuitive and inclusive. I work alongside a fantastic team of full-stack engineers with over fifteen years of experience. Together, We Make IT Happen.
founder.passion: It took years of reflection to realise it, but helping people solve real problems is my true passion. I care deeply about inclusive and accessible software — because no one should be left behind when navigating their digital world. People are different, and needs are different, yet everyone deserves a smooth, frustration-free experience. Applications shape our everyday lives, whether we realise it or not. My mission is to help entrepreneurs just like you build products that your customers genuinely enjoy using.
founder.differenceHeading: So what makes our services different?
founder.differenceHighlight: A genuine obsession with solving the right problems in the right way.
founder.differenceText: If you have a challenge, we will find you a clear and practical solution — without unnecessary complexity or jargon getting in the way.
founder.quote: When your business solves a real problem for real people, that is where success begins.
founder.quoteFooter: And we know how to help you reach that point.
founder.callout: Ready to share your idea? Fill in the form below and we will send you a free, no-obligation quote. Your customers deserve a better experience — and it all starts here.
founder.imgAlt: Lana, founder of We Make IT

about.body1: We Make IT is a software development studio based in Ireland. We help businesses and founders bring ideas to life, and offer consulting and support for existing projects.
about.body2: From your first question to launch and beyond, we are with you.
about.body3: Our team combines full-stack development, accessible design, UX, and business expertise. We have worked at large tech companies and bring that experience to small and medium-sized businesses.
about.tagline: Wherever you are, if you have an idea, we would love to hear it.
about.languageNote: By the way, we also speak

values.title: We Welcome Every Client
values.description: No idea is too small. Whether you are a startup founder, a business owner, or someone just exploring an idea, we are happy to talk. Free first consultation, no commitment required.

values.title: Big-Company Experience
values.description: Our team has 15+ years of experience building products at major tech companies. We bring that expertise and quality to every project, no matter the size.

values.title: Personal Attention, Every Step
values.description: You work directly with our team, not a sales rep or account manager. Expect fast replies, straight talk, and genuine care from first idea to launch and beyond.

values.title: One Fixed Price. No Surprises.
values.description: You know exactly what you are paying before we start. No hidden extras, no surprise invoices. Got a quote from another company? We will beat it.

process.subheading: Tell us your idea and we will take it from there.

steps.title: Tell Us Your Idea
steps.description: Fill in the form and describe your idea in plain words.

steps.title: We Send You a Quote
steps.description: We review your idea and send you an estimated cost range and a potential implementation plan.

steps.title: You Review the Proposal
steps.description: You review the proposal and we schedule a consultation meeting online or offline to discuss further details.

steps.title: We Shake Hands
steps.description: When you are ready to start, we sign a simple contract to get everything in writing.

steps.title: We Start the Work
steps.description: You pay the deposit and we get building. Easy as that.

ctaStrip.heading: Not sure if your idea is ready?
ctaStrip.body1: That is exactly when to talk to us. Fill in the form with details about your idea and we will give you feedback.
ctaStrip.body2: With in-house experience in Design Thinking and MVP, we help you validate your idea before committing to a full build.

contact.heading: Tell Us Your Idea
contact.body: Fill in the form with as much detail as you can. The more you share, the more accurate your quote and plan will be.

blog.title: Blog: App and Business Ideas for Irish Entrepreneurs | We Make IT
blog.description: Practical guides on building apps, finding funding, and turning your business idea into a digital product. Written for Irish entrepreneurs by the We Make IT team.
blog.ogTitle: App Development Insights for Irish Entrepreneurs | We Make IT Blog
blog.ogDescription: Practical advice on building apps, getting funding, and turning business ideas into real digital products.

cookieBanner.text: We use strictly necessary cookies to keep the site working. We do not use tracking or advertising cookies without your consent.

intro.ie: Based in Ireland. Serving SMEs and starting entrepreneurs across Ireland and Northern Ireland.
intro.gb: Based in Ireland. Serving SMEs and starting entrepreneurs across Ireland and the UK.
intro.it: Based in Ireland. Serving SMEs and starting entrepreneurs across Italy.
intro.ch: Based in Ireland. Serving SMEs and starting entrepreneurs across Switzerland.
intro.suffixWebDev: 15+ years of experience. Fixed pricing, no surprises.

h1.gb: Web Development in Ireland & the UK

desc.ie: Professional web development services for Irish businesses. We build custom websites, business platforms, and e-commerce solutions that drive real results.
desc.gb: Professional web development services for UK and Irish businesses. We build custom websites, business platforms, and e-commerce solutions that drive real results.
desc.it: Professional web development services for Italian businesses. We build custom websites, business platforms, and e-commerce solutions that drive real results.
desc.ch: Professional web development services for Swiss-Italian businesses. We build custom websites, business platforms, and e-commerce solutions that drive real results.

webDev.ctaHeading: Ready to build your web presence?
webDev.whatWeDoSub: From simple business websites to complex web applications — we cover it all.

whatWeDo.title: Business Websites
whatWeDo.description: Clean, professional websites that represent your brand, rank on Google, and turn visitors into customers.

whatWeDo.title: E-Commerce Stores
whatWeDo.description: Sell online with confidence. We build and configure your store, payment processing, and product management from scratch.

whatWeDo.title: CMS-Powered Sites
whatWeDo.description: Update your content without touching code. We build on trusted platforms so you stay in control after launch.

whatWeDo.title: Web Applications
whatWeDo.description: Booking systems, client portals, dashboards, marketplaces — if your business needs more than a website, we build it.

whatWeDo.title: Landing Pages
whatWeDo.description: Launch fast with a focused, conversion-optimised page for your product, campaign, or service.

whatWeDo.title: Website Redesign
whatWeDo.description: Got a website that's letting you down? We rebuild it properly — faster, better-looking, and easier to manage.

why.title: Fixed Price, No Surprises
why.description: You know the full cost before we start. No hidden extras, no surprise invoices mid-project.

why.title: Mobile-First by Default
why.description: Every website we build works perfectly on phones, tablets, and desktops. It's not optional — it's how we work.

why.title: Built for Search Engines
why.description: Clean code, fast loading, proper structure. Your site is ready to rank from day one.

why.title: Accessible to Everyone
why.description: We build to WCAG 2.1 AA standards so your site works for all users and meets legal requirements.

deliverables: Fully custom website designed to match your brand
Mobile-friendly, fast-loading pages out of the box
SEO foundations: meta tags, sitemap, structured data
Content management system so you can update it yourself
webDev.finalCtaHeading: Ready to talk about your website?
webDev.finalCtaBody: Tell us what you need and we'll send you a free, no-obligation quote within 48 hours.

h1.gb: App Development in Ireland & the UK

desc.ie: From MVP to market-ready product. We build custom mobile apps, web applications, and progressive web apps for Irish businesses. Fixed pricing. No hidden costs.
desc.gb: From MVP to market-ready product. We build custom mobile apps, web applications, and progressive web apps for UK and Irish businesses. Fixed pricing. No hidden costs.
desc.it: From MVP to market-ready product. We build custom mobile apps, web applications, and progressive web apps for Italian businesses. Fixed pricing. No hidden costs.
desc.ch: From MVP to market-ready product. We build custom mobile apps, web applications, and progressive web apps for Swiss and Italian businesses. Fixed pricing. No hidden costs.

appDev.whatWeDoSub: From a first prototype to a full production app — we cover every stage.

whatWeDo.title: iOS Apps
whatWeDo.description: Native and React Native apps for iPhone and iPad. Smooth, performant, App Store ready.

whatWeDo.title: Android Apps
whatWeDo.description: Native and cross-platform Android apps, built to Google Play standards and optimised for a wide range of devices.

whatWeDo.title: Cross-Platform Apps
whatWeDo.description: One codebase, two platforms. We use React Native and Expo so you launch on iOS and Android without doubling the budget.

whatWeDo.title: Progressive Web Apps
whatWeDo.description: Web apps that install and feel like native apps. A cost-effective route to mobile-first experiences.

whatWeDo.title: Web Applications
whatWeDo.description: Booking systems, client portals, dashboards, marketplaces — if your business needs more than a website, we build it.

whatWeDo.title: MVP Development
whatWeDo.description: Launch the smallest version that proves your idea. Real users, real feedback, minimum spend — then we scale.

why.title: Fixed Price from Day One
why.description: You know the full cost before we write a line of code. No hourly billing, no scope creep surprises.

why.title: Accessibility Built In
why.description: We build to WCAG 2.1 AA so your app works for all users and meets EU accessibility requirements from launch.

why.title: Design Thinking First
why.description: We validate before we build. Your idea is tested with real users before a single feature is committed to production.

why.title: 15+ Years of Experience
why.description: Our team has shipped products at scale. We bring that experience to every project, no matter the size.

h1.gb: UX & Accessibility Audit for Ireland & the UK

uxAudit.desc: Ensure your website or app is accessible to all users and compliant with WCAG 2.1 AA standards. Get a detailed audit report with actionable recommendations.
uxAudit.descCh: Ensure your website or app is accessible to all users and compliant with WCAG 2.1 AA standards. Get a detailed audit report with actionable recommendations for Swiss businesses under EU accessibility regulations.
uxAudit.euBody: The EU Accessibility Act deadline passed in June 2025. If your site or app is not yet compliant, you are already at risk. We help you catch up fast and avoid legal exposure.
uxAudit.item2: Issues categorized by severity (critical, major, minor)
uxAudit.item4: Overall compliance score and comparison to standards
uxAudit.item5: Optional remediation plan with implementation priorities
uxAudit.ctaHeading: Start with a free 15-minute accessibility health check

h1.ie: Idea Validation & MVP Development in Ireland
h1.gb: Idea Validation & MVP Development in Ireland & the UK
h1.it: Idea Validation & MVP Development in Italy
h1.ch: Idea Validation & MVP Development in Switzerland

ideaMvp.desc: Not sure if your idea will work? We help you validate it before spending a penny on a full build — then create a lean MVP you can test with real users.

whatItems.title: Idea Workshop
whatItems.description: We run a structured session to explore your idea, identify assumptions, and map out the core problem you are solving.

whatItems.title: Market & User Research
whatItems.description: We check if the market exists, who your users are, and whether they would pay for what you are building.

whatItems.title: Prototyping
whatItems.description: We create a clickable prototype you can test with real users before committing to a full build.

whatItems.title: MVP Build
whatItems.description: We build the smallest version of your product that proves the concept. Then we iterate based on feedback.

whyItems: Save months of development time on the wrong idea
Get real user feedback before investing in production code
Impress investors with validated data and a working prototype
Launch faster and cheaper with a focused MVP

h1.gb: UX Research Services in Ireland & the UK

uxResearch.desc: Already have a product? We research how real people use it, identify usability problems, and give you a clear prioritised list of improvements.

whatItems.title: User Interviews
whatItems.description: We talk to your real users to understand their goals, frustrations, and mental models.

whatItems.title: Usability Testing
whatItems.description: We observe users completing real tasks in your product and record exactly where they struggle.

whatItems.title: Heuristic Evaluation
whatItems.description: We review your product against established UX principles and identify issues without needing users.

whatItems.title: Research Report
whatItems.description: You receive a clear, prioritised report with screenshots, severity ratings, and specific recommendations.

deliverables: Full research report with findings and evidence
Issues prioritised by impact and effort
Optional follow-up call to discuss the report

h1.gb: UX Design Services in Ireland & the UK

uxDesign.desc: From wireframes to polished UI — we turn research findings and product ideas into designs that are intuitive, accessible, and ready to build.

whatItems.title: Information Architecture
whatItems.description: We structure your content and navigation so users always know where they are and where to go next.

whatItems.title: Wireframing
whatItems.description: Low-fidelity layouts that define the flow and structure before we invest in visual design.

whatItems.title: UI Design
whatItems.description: High-fidelity screens in your brand — clean, modern, and built to convert.

whatItems.title: Design System
whatItems.description: A reusable component library that keeps your product consistent and speeds up future development.

deliverables: Figma files with all screens and components
Responsive layouts for mobile, tablet, and desktop
Accessibility annotations (colour contrast, focus order, ARIA notes)

h1.gb: App Prototyping Service in Ireland & the UK

appPrototype.desc: Before committing to a full build, we create an interactive, clickable prototype of your app. Test it with users, share it with investors, and validate every key flow.

whatItems.title: Clickable Figma Prototype
whatItems.description: A fully interactive prototype you can share with a link. No code required, but it feels like the real thing.

whatItems.title: User Flow Mapping
whatItems.description: We map every key user journey so the prototype covers the flows that matter most.

whatItems.title: User Testing
whatItems.description: We run a round of user tests on the prototype and report back on what works and what needs changing.

whatItems.title: Investor-Ready Presentation
whatItems.description: A polished prototype with supporting documentation for investor pitches and product demos.

whyItems: Find usability problems before they are expensive to fix
Validate your concept with real users at low cost
Get clearer developer estimates from a detailed prototype
Pitch with confidence — show, don't just tell

h1.gb: Mobile App Development in Ireland & the UK

mobileAppDev.desc: We build mobile apps for iOS and Android that your users will love. Cross-platform development means you launch on both platforms without doubling the cost.

whatItems.title: iOS Apps
whatItems.description: Native Swift and React Native apps for iPhone and iPad, optimised for the App Store.

whatItems.title: Android Apps
whatItems.description: Apps built for the full range of Android devices and optimised for Google Play.

whatItems.title: Cross-Platform Apps
whatItems.description: One codebase, both platforms. React Native and Expo let you ship to iOS and Android with a shared team and budget.

whatItems.title: App Maintenance
whatItems.description: Post-launch support, OS updates, bug fixes, and new feature development as your product grows.

whyItems.title: Accessibility from Day One
whyItems.description: Every app we build meets WCAG 2.1 AA. VoiceOver, TalkBack, and dynamic text all tested before launch.

whyItems.title: Design Thinking Approach
whyItems.description: We validate flows and screens with users before we write production code. You ship what users actually want.

whyItems.title: Fixed Pricing
whyItems.description: You know the cost before we start. No hourly billing, no surprise invoices at the end of a sprint.

whyItems.title: Full Stack Team
whyItems.description: Design, frontend, backend, and DevOps all under one roof. No handoff problems, no coordination overhead.

h1.gb: Software Consultancy in Ireland & the UK

softwareConsultancy.desc: Not sure what to build, which technology to choose, or how to get your existing product back on track? We give you clear, honest advice — no jargon, no vendor lock-in.

whatItems.title: Technology Strategy
whatItems.description: Which stack, which platform, which architecture. We lay out the options clearly and help you choose with confidence.

whatItems.title: CTO as a Service
whatItems.description: Need senior technical leadership without a full-time hire? We act as your fractional CTO for as long as you need.

whatItems.title: Product Review
whatItems.description: We review your existing product or codebase and give you a plain-English report on what's working and what isn't.

whatItems.title: Team Scaling Advice
whatItems.description: Build in-house, outsource, or hybrid? We help you decide what makes sense for your stage and budget.

whyItems: 15+ years of experience building products at scale
Honest advice — we tell you what you need to hear, not what you want to hear
No jargon. We speak plain English so you can make informed decisions
We have no financial interest in recommending specific vendors or tools

h1.gb: App Maintenance & Support in Ireland & the UK

maintenanceSupport.desc: Already have an app or website that needs looking after? We take it on — fixing bugs, keeping it up to date, adding features, and ensuring it runs smoothly month to month.

whatItems.title: Bug Fixes
whatItems.description: We respond to issues fast and fix bugs before they impact your users or your reputation.

whatItems.title: Security Updates
whatItems.description: Regular dependency updates, security patches, and vulnerability monitoring to keep your product safe.

whatItems.title: Performance Monitoring
whatItems.description: We track uptime, load times, and errors — and fix problems before you or your users notice them.

whatItems.title: Feature Development
whatItems.description: Retainer clients get dedicated development capacity each month for new features, improvements, and integrations.

maintenanceSupport.retainerBody: We offer monthly support retainers starting from a fixed number of development hours. You know exactly what you are getting and what it costs.
maintenanceSupport.whyHeading: Why a Retainer Works Better Than Ad-Hoc
whyItems: Predictable monthly cost with no surprise invoices
Dedicated team who knows your product inside out
Faster response times than one-off engagements
Proactive monitoring means fewer emergencies

h1.ie: Website & App Localisation Services in Ireland
h1.gb: Website & App Localisation Services in Ireland & the UK
h1.it: Website & App Localisation Services in Italy
h1.ch: Website & App Localisation Services in Switzerland

localisation.desc: We handle the full localisation of your website or app — from translating content to integrating i18n frameworks in your codebase. We have done it for our own product, and we can do it for yours.
localisation.uniqueBody: Most localisation agencies translate content but have no idea how to wire it into a React or Next.js app. We do both — in-house linguistic expertise and the technical skills to implement it. No awkward handoffs, no broken layouts from right-to-left text, no missing string keys.

whatItems.title: Content Translation
whatItems.description: Accurate, natural-sounding translation into the target language — not machine translation copy-pasted into a CMS.

whatItems.title: i18n Framework Integration
whatItems.description: We wire up next-intl, i18next, or your chosen library. All strings externalised, all routes localised.

whatItems.title: RTL Layout Support
whatItems.description: Arabic, Hebrew, and other right-to-left languages require layout changes. We handle them correctly.

whatItems.title: Locale Testing
whatItems.description: We test every locale end to end — text overflow, date formats, currency symbols, and number formatting.

localisation.languages: English, Italian, Russian, French, German, Spanish, Arabic (RTL). Contact us for others.
whyItems: Reach new markets without rebuilding your product
Localised products convert significantly better than translated ones
Meet legal requirements in jurisdictions that mandate local-language content
Give every user a native-feeling experience regardless of their language
